title: diasperus abnormis
side_effects: Diasperus abnormis can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, diarrhea, and abdominal pain in some individuals. Prolonged use or excessive consumption of the plant can also lead to more severe side effects, including liver damage, kidney failure, and cardiovascular issues. Additionally, improper use of the plant can cause allergic reactions, such as hives, itching, and difficulty breathing, in sensitive individuals. In extreme cases, improper use of the plant can even lead to seizures, coma, or even death in rare instances.
